titleStmt.title: SII 26.437: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 437. (A.R. No. 416 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is built in at the bottom.

It records a gift of a standing lamp made of bronze and bell-metal, a bell and a vessel made of brass to the temple of the god Tiruppulippagavadēvar of Śiṟṟiṅgūr a brahmadēśam in Kuṟukkaik-kūṟṟam in Malāḍu in Irājarāja-vaḷanāḍu by a certain Śivadavaṉapperumāḷ •• Vāmaṉa-bhaṭṭaṉ [Vāḷappiṟaṉdā] Birammarāyan, son of Kāśivaṉ Ādipurāṇaṉ Āṭkoṉṭāṉ bhaṭṭaṉ of Aiyyavēli belonging to Pālaiyūr alias Irājanārāyanacharuppēdimaṅgalam. It is stated that the gift was made for the merit of two dēvaraḍiyārs (dancing girls), named Śōḻiyanāchchi alias Poṉṉār Tiruvaḍimāṇikkam, daughter of Peṟṟāḷ of Śiṟṟiṅgūr, and the former's daughter Āḷavandapiḷḷai alias Pirāṇattiyāgi-naṅgai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉacakkiravattikaḷ tiripuvaṉaviratevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 5 vatu
Irājarājavaḷanāṭṭu malāṭṭukkuṟukkaik kūṟṟattu piramatecam ciṟṟiṅkūr
Āḷuṭaiyār tiruppulippakavatevaṟku Ivvūr tevaṟaṭiyāḷ peṟṟāḷ makaḷ
coḻiyanācciyāṉa poṉṉārtiruvaṭimāṇikkattukkum Ivaḷ makaḷ Āḷavaṉ
tapiḷḷaiyāṉa pirāṇattiyākinaṅkaikkum Āka pālaiyūrāṉa Irājanārāyaṇacarup
petimaṅkalattu Aiyyaveli kācivaṉ Ātipurāṇaṉ Āṭkoṇṭāṉ paṭṭaṉ
makaṉ civatavaṉapperumāḷ vāmaṉa paṭṭaṉ vāḷappiṟaṉtā pirammarāyana I
ṭṭa veṇkalamum tarāvum kūṭiṉa kuttuviḷakku kal Iṭaiyāl veṇkala
maṇi kal Iṭaiyāl pittaḷait tūṅkal Iṭai 2 10 kal pittaḷai ti
p pāttira Iṭai 10 6 l pittaḷai tippāttira Iṭai 2 10 4 l pittaḷaic can
kal Iṭai 10 lDamaged.
Digital edition of SII 26.437 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
